zh.lifeSummary: David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie是Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March和Christina Seton的兒子，於1379年出生在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾考可波斯帕斯。他和Beatrice至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1443年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie was born in 1379, in Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March and Christina Seton. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Beatrice. He died in 1443, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie est né en 1379, à Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March et Christina Seton. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Beatrice. Il est décédé en 1443, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzieは1379年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアコクブルンスプアスでSir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of MarchとChristina Setonの息子として生まれた。彼はBeatriceとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1443年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie(은)는 1379년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 콕번스팻h에서 Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March(와)과 Christina Seton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Beatrice(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1443년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: David Dunbar of Cockburn and Auchtermonzie родился в 1379 г. в местности коккбурнспат, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March и Christina Seton. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Beatrice. Он умер в 1443 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.
